name: Cranberry Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Cream butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed with an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and sour cream to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Stir in almond extract.
6. Spoon half of the batter into a greased 10-inch Bundt or tube pan.
7. Spread half of the cranberry sauce over the batter, swirling partially through with a knife.
8. Repeat with remaining batter and cranberry sauce.
9. Sprinkle pecans evenly over the top.
10. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Let stand in the pan for 5 minutes before removing it.
12. Invert onto a serving plate and drizzle with glaze.
GLAZE
Combine powdered sugar, warm water, and almond extract in a bowl. Stir well. Yield: 1/4 cup.
